policy: ML crawl intelligence is for prioritization and review only. It must not be used to bypass robots, paywalls, CAPTCHAs, authentication, or access controls.

strategies.name: Metadata-first academic crawl
strategies.goal: Prioritize article, DOI, journal, volume, issue, and chapter URLs while avoiding assets and unrelated pages.

strategies.name: Component discovery crawl
strategies.goal: Sample diverse page templates to find tables, cards, navigation, download links, and repeated components.

strategies.name: Quality-focused recrawl
strategies.goal: Use feedback and quality labels to retry promising low-quality pages and skip repeated failure patterns.
